title: calamus pseudotenuis
intro: Calamus pseudotenuis, also known as Lesser Calamus or Thin-leaved Sweet Flag, is a type of rhizomatous perennial plant belonging to the family Zingiberaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent, which helps in soothing digestive issues, relieving pain, and reducing inflammation. The plant is also known to have several health benefits, including aiding in the relief of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, and its antimicrobial properties help in fighting off infections. Calamus pseudotenuis can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine and Ayurvedic practices.
